Intentional ECS pattern: SharedEbo field must persist across method calls for GPU buffer reuse. Moving to local would break GPU state.
Intentional pattern: indicesHandle must persist for GPU buffer lifecycle management. Local variable would be GC'd prematurely.
Intentional SFML pattern: delegate field must be static to prevent GC collection of delegate. Well-known SFML requirement.
Intentional GLFW pattern: closeCallback field must persist to prevent GC collection. Well-known GLFW requirement.
